title: Frontend Context Wiring Sprint — X-Company-Id on all remaining frontend calls
scope: 17 files, 41 fetch calls. Inline X-Company-Id header injection (same pattern as 68B.2-FU). After this sprint: NO naked fetch to /api/company/ anywhere in app/ or components/. apiClient consolidation deferred to optional Task 68B.5.

checks.name: invariant — NO naked fetch to /api/company/ remaining
checks.what: Total fetch() calls in app/ + components/ must equal total X-Company-Id header occurrences. (Handlers calling fetch twice — like handlePost — are counted accordingly.)
checks.url: bash -c 'fc=$(grep -rn "fetch.*api/company/" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" app/ components/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l); hc=$(grep -rn "X-Company-Id" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" app/ components/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo "fetches=$fc headers=$hc (headers must be >= fetches)"'

checks.name: products — page has X-Company-Id on all 4 fetches
checks.what: 4 fetch calls (load, save PATCH, delete DELETE, copy POST) all carry header

checks.name: sales — [saleId] page has X-Company-Id on all 6 fetches
checks.what: load, save PATCH, save-before-post PATCH, post POST, copy POST, cancel POST

checks.name: warehouse — page + [warehouseId] have X-Company-Id
checks.what: balance + movements fetches on both pages carry header

checks.name: chart-of-accounts — all 8 fetches migrated
checks.what: accounts list, import skr03, import text, bulk check, bulk delete, create, edit, delete

checks.name: select dialogs — all 8 components carry X-Company-Id
checks.what: Client, Warehouse, Product, OperationType, Employee, Account, VATRate dialogs
checks.url: bash -c 'for f in components/select/*Dialog.tsx; do c=$(grep -c "X-Company-Id" "$f"); echo "$c — $f"; done'

checks.name: form components — ClientForm, ClientSelector, ProductSelector
checks.what: Form components carry header on all 4 fetch calls
checks.url: bash -c 'grep -c "X-Company-Id" components/clients/ClientForm.tsx; grep -c "X-Company-Id" components/clients/ClientSelector.tsx; grep -c "X-Company-Id" components/products/ProductSelector.tsx'

checks.name: runtime — Products list opens without error
checks.what: UI: open Products → no COMPANY_CONTEXT_MISSING banner
checks.url: echo 'manual: UI → Products — list loads correctly, no error'

checks.name: runtime — Product edit page loads + saves
checks.what: UI: open Product detail → edit field → Save → 'Saved' message
checks.url: echo 'manual: UI → Products → click product → edit field → Save'

checks.name: runtime — SelectDialog (ClientSelectDialog) opens in Purchase editor
checks.what: UI: New Purchase → click Supplier field → dialog opens with clients list
checks.url: echo 'manual: UI → New Purchase → Supplier select — dialog must show client list without errors'

checks.name: runtime — ProductSelector works in PurchaseItemsEdit
checks.what: UI: Purchase editor → Add Item → product selector opens and populates fields
checks.url: echo 'manual: UI → Purchase editor → Add Item → Select product — should show products list'

checks.name: runtime — Full Purchase POST cycle (FINAL Task 68B.2 RUNTIME VERIFY)
checks.what: Create new purchase via UI → select Supplier/Warehouse/Product → Save → Post → status=POSTED → 5 snapshot fields populated
checks.url: echo 'manual: New Purchase → fill via dialogs → Save → Post → verify in DB: SELECT totalNetAmount, totalVatAmount, totalGrossAmount, journalEntryId, postedAt FROM purchase_documents WHERE id=...'

not_included: Migration to apiClient (lib/api/apiClient.ts) — kept inline injection pattern for symmetry with 68B.2-FU. Optional Task 68B.5 if consolidation desired.
ESLint rule 'no-restricted-syntax for naked fetch /api/company/' — proposed for Task 68B.5
Sales POST endpoint (sales/[saleId]/post route.ts) — Task 68B.3 scope
SolarBox v3.11 auto-prisma-generate after schema patch — separate sprint

automation.method: Python script with regex-based pattern matching
patterns_handled: fetch(url, { method: 'X', headers: { 'Content-Type': '...' } }) → adds X-Company-Id key
